ACH and wire transfer API for fintech applications

review.verdict: Serious BaaS choice for US fintechs, but recent industry consolidation means do thorough partner-bank diligence.

review.not_for: Non-US markets or projects avoiding heavy compliance

lock_in.reason: BaaS bank partnerships hard to migrate
